steps.title: Identify how the methods relate
steps.content: Seismic monitoring detects the rough location; orbital imaging then uses that to find the precise location. They work together, each enabling what the other does.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the word
steps.content: We need a word for a relationship where two things work together, each providing what the other cannot. Complementary directly expresses this meaning. Exhaustive, redundant, and interchangeable describe unrelated relationships. That matches choice D — D is correct.
